title: helichrysum lesliei
intro: Helichrysum lesliei is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family, also known as the yellow curry plant, which is native to Madagascar. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum lesliei are numerous, including reducing inflammation and pain, promoting wound healing, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oils, teas, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
